reviews.author: Lesly Solis
reviews.text: Vive La Crêpe is one of my favorite spots for great crêpes and friendly service. The food is always fresh and flavorful. I was disappointed to learn that the smoothies, especially the Very Berry Smoothie, have been discontinued. It was a refreshing favorite that paired perfectly with a crêpe. I hope Vive La Crêpe considers bringing it back. I still highly recommend this restaurant and would love to see the Very Berry Smoothie return.

reviews.author: dew chan
reviews.text: Had a decent experience here. Appreciated the crepes and enjoyed the company I was with, thanks to Sam. Will likely check out again!

reviews.author: Emily Zhou
reviews.text: This place has so many new flavors I never tried before so I stopped by. Sam gave the best recommendations and I have no regrets for visiting. Perfect bite for my day off!

reviews.author: Shirley Liu
reviews.text: This was a nice sweet treat after a long run in Central Park. Sam was amazing with her recommendations and customer service!

reviews.author: Constance Wu
reviews.text: The crepes here were great. Sam patiently helped us and gave us great recommendations!

reviews.author: Dash Kupper
reviews.text: One of my favorite spots in the city, love popping in before going to CP! Sam really goes above and beyond to make you feel welcome, and it’s really refreshing going somewhere where people know your name as soon as you walk in.

reviews.author: Stephanie M
reviews.text: After visiting a nearby museum we wanted a sweet treat so we popped over to Vive La Crepe. Couldn't decide between sweet or savory, so Sam very helpfully worked with us to narrow it down to Pesto Chicken and Nutella Strawberry. Can't go wrong with ordering both! Thanks Sam!

reviews.author: Celine Lam
reviews.text: Sam was super nice and provided great service! The food was so delicious!!

reviews.author: Melanie Salamat
reviews.text: sam was the best! so kind and her crepe was so yummy!!

reviews.author: Jennifer Zhou
reviews.text: Sam was great!

reviews.author: Justin Martinez
reviews.text: My wife and I were starving and we dropped by a couple months ago for a bite. Got myself the classic nutella crepe with strawberry and the server Sam made it extra crispy per my preference. Not a huge fan of crepes that are too floppy. Very delicious especially when seasoned with hunger. Wife had a chicken pesto crepe and she was happy. Will plan to drop by again now that the weather is finally good.

reviews.author: Joshua Lee
reviews.text: Stopped by earlier this week walking by this cute cafe and so glad I did! After the quick lunch rush I was able to sit and work with the free wifi! Delicious cortado made by Sam. Recommend.

reviews.author: Brian Hidalgo
reviews.text: The food was amazing! Everything was perfectly cooked, with great employees! Extra coupons to the boss Sam R for being a great presence to elevate the amazing experience! Definitely coming back.

reviews.author: Jenny Lu
reviews.text: Delicious crepes! I really enjoyed it and the girl that helped me was really nice. I have a really bad nut allergy and Samantha was really helpful in suggesting which items were safe for me. I had a really great experience at this location.

reviews.author: Gianne Catarata
reviews.text: Pesto is my favorite!! Shoutout to Sam for her awesome service and for recommending it. Will definitely be back!

reviews.author: Yenmin Young
reviews.text: I can never choose between the Provence crepe and the Smoked Salmon. They are so good! Came here after my friend’s elopement photo shoot and we got some great vibe pics. Thanks to the staff Sam Ma for making the visit more special!

reviews.author: Benny Zhen
reviews.text: Samantha recommended me the Chicken Pesto Crepe along with the Strawberry Dragonfruit Refresher. It was delicious! Highly recommend this. Bonus points for outdoor seating.

reviews.author: Peter Kehinde
reviews.text: Went to see what the hype was about real quick and just had the perfect banana chocolate crepe. It was warm full with fresh banana and strawberries. The server Samantha made my visit even better; 10/10 friendly service

reviews.author: Pharisha Cortes
reviews.text: We had a great experience at this location. We have come multiple times and Sam is always very kind and patient.

reviews.author: sofia mazuera
reviews.text: Sam was amazing, she made the crepe spectacular and it proves it because I came in yesterday as well

reviews.author: Samantha Poon
reviews.text: Very cute place. The crepes were delicious and I especially appreciated the service I received from Samantha M. She was professional and super friendly. Would rec!

reviews.author: Miu Kawahara
reviews.text: I had an amazing experience at Viva La Crepe and Sam was so sweet and kind! Their service was impeccable and really made me feel welcome😁

reviews.author: Kevin “SovereignReaper”
reviews.text: Loved this crepe shop! The crepes were delicious, and Sam provided amazing service with a friendly attitude, and she made sure everything was perfect which elevated the experience. Highly recommend if you're looking for a tasty treat.

reviews.author: Anna Lin
reviews.text:
The crepes are delicious and fresh!
The server Sam was really friendly, gave good vibes and aura.
We enjoyed our time there :) would def come back esp when I’m around the area !

reviews.author: Marylin Torres
reviews.text: Sam provides Amazing services and is extremely helpful with questions regarding the menu. Love this place and the Sugar Butter Lemon crepe is my favorite.

reviews.author: Y
reviews.text: Sam님이 정말 친절하셨어요. 덕분에 기분 좋게 식사할 수 있었습니다. 가게 분위기도 아늑하고 편안해서 정말 마음에 들었고, 다음에 또 방문하고 싶어요!

reviews.author: Haru
reviews.text: Their gluten free buckwheat crepe was amazing. Thank you Sam!!

reviews.author: Non
reviews.text: Finally found a crepe spot where I can bring my gluten-free friend!! Huge shoutout to Sam for taking such great care of us :)

reviews.author: Lily
reviews.text: Love this cute place with great staff. Sam is amazing!!

reviews.author: 春
reviews.text: クレープ美味しかった！Samさんが私の拙い英語にも優しく対応してくれました

reviews.author: Yurie Ono
reviews.text: Good food, good service. Sam was very nice and friendly.

reviews.author: Christa Tempestilli
reviews.text: Good food, great service - thank you Sam!

reviews.author: Chris
reviews.text: If you haven't been here yet, you are missing out! Incredible crepes and next-level service. Sam is an absolute rockstar—so friendly and completely made our day.

reviews.author: Steph
reviews.text: The crepes are simple and good. The girl behind the counter, Sam, was so nice! She was very welcoming and provided excellent customer service.

reviews.author: Erica Chou
reviews.text: The food here hits the spot. Great place to sit and relax or grab a quick bite to eat. Sam is so fast serves top quality food. She even offered to remake my coffee when I spilled it! Amazing customer service always. Recommend ❤️

reviews.author: Alice Lin
reviews.text: Great coffee, great crepes and free wifi! Service is top notch - Sam was friendly and makes the most delicious crepes. Amazing multitasking - serving drinks, making crepes and greeting with a smile.

reviews.author: Priscilla Lin
reviews.text: Love the Strawberry dragonfruit refresher! Best drink to have on a nice summer day. Shout out to Sam for recommending it, gotta try the other ones and def a crepe next time!

reviews.author: Michael Cariaso
reviews.text: Vive La Crêpe is a great spot if you’re in the mood for something quick and tasty. Love how the crepes are made fresh. I typically get sweet crepes and tried the Nutella one and it definitely hit the spot. Def gotta stop by to try a savory one. Staff was friendly, and shoutout to Sam for keeping the vibes up. Solid place to stop by when you’re in the area.

reviews.author: Yang Xu
reviews.text: Sam was amazing and gave us excellent recommendations. I will definitely be coming back!

reviews.author: Eddie Wang
reviews.text: Good service, shout out to Sam who took care of us

reviews.author: Derrick Vinluan
reviews.text: Sam is great. Will keep coming back for le crepe.

reviews.author: Michelle
reviews.text: Very cute spot. Extra star for Sam!

reviews.author: Chris Chu
reviews.text: Service was great, was on a time crunch but Sam was great. Turkey Dijon definitely hit the spot!

reviews.author: Mo Rahman
reviews.text: These crepes are gonna make me fat if I keep coming here. I can always count on Sam to recommend me a new one to try each time.

reviews.author: Johnny Khem
reviews.text: Sam was awesome! Quick, friendly, and made sure everything was perfect.

reviews.author: HN
reviews.text: Great experience overall. Sam was super friendly and provided excellent service!

reviews.author: peter lin
reviews.text: Very good tasting crepes! I would recommend. The pesto is my favorite! Sam was very friendly and wrapped the crepes nicely.

reviews.author: Jose Santana
reviews.text: It's often busy during lunch time but it's definitely worth the wait. It's the best place to eat during my break and I'm so glad there are seats outside so I can eat and enjoy the weather. The staff was really nice, and they gave lots of recommendations. Sam recommended the sugar butter and it's so addicting. Will be coming back for some more later in the week.

reviews.author: Sonali Ann
reviews.text: Crepe was so good and the customer service was fire. Shoutout Victoria

reviews.author: Vicky Tan
reviews.text: The Crepes were awesome. Thank you, Sam, for recommended the Chicken Pesto. It is by far the best crepe I had.

reviews.author: Jenny Lin
reviews.text: Tasty crepes! I recommend trying the savory and sweet crepes. Entree and dessert wrap up in crepes. Also Super fun to watch the crepier, Sam, make it with such mastery.

reviews.author: Tom Castro
reviews.text: Love coming here after school! Sam is always so nice, and the food always slaps.

reviews.author: Enoch Pu
reviews.text: The crepes were delicious, but the service was even better! Sam was incredibly welcoming and recommended the Nutella banana crepe it was an absolute amazing. I will definitely be back!

reviews.author: Brian Smith
reviews.text: Tasty crepes and immaculate vibes. Huge shoutout to Sam for being so genuinely friendly and making us feel right at home.

reviews.author: Tony Ho
reviews.text: Loved this place! The crepes were good, but the service was even better. Shoutout to Sam for being so welcoming and friendly. We'll be back for sure!

reviews.author: Kira Chan
reviews.text: I love coming here. The sweet smell once you come in is intoxicating. I get the sweet crepes more than the savory. Pistachio and dark chocolate is my favorite. Shout-out to Sam she's so fast and nice. Come check this place out.

reviews.author: Felipe Ucrós
reviews.text: Fast, delicious, Sam is so helpful!

reviews.author: Hilary M
reviews.text: Great service from Sam at the one on Columbus!

reviews.author: Shirley Wu
reviews.text: 10/10 spot. Crepes are delicious (ask for it well done for crispy so good) Sam is so nice, always with a smile on her face. Great customer service. Definitely recommend!

reviews.author: Carl Gold
reviews.text: Hardworking staff crushed after school rush with duende. Delicious food made in front of you.

reviews.author: Sajjad Khan
reviews.text: doesn't seem clean

reviews.author: Angela Roy
reviews.text: I Love Vive La Crepe-longtime customer.. this location has such pleasant staff and well made crepes!

reviews.author: Kathleen Bradley
reviews.text: Good savory and sweet options to choose from and fast service. I got Provence which had good flavor but was missing balsamic, very minimal cheese and a lot of spinach. The  dessert ones were good. Overall ok but lacks anything beyond basic.

reviews.author: Califun
reviews.text: The fillings are good.  The crepes had a very eggy texture and taste and somewhat rubbery, not light and buttery as I expected.  Plain presentation. Cute café with outside seating.

reviews.author: Shirley Song
reviews.text: This place is great with the gluten free options.

reviews.author: Jacobo lopez
reviews.text: The crepe was good, but I didn't like the coffee the service was bad. 😩 Starbucks coffee is 100 times better; this was very watery.

reviews.author: Loh Phat
reviews.text:
It's really nice to see a crepe place have buckwheat batter but it's a little "thin" it should be more grainy and "rustic".

Also, it should be folden into an open square with the option of a fried egg in the middle! ❤️

reviews.author: Tessa Eagar
reviews.text: Not worth your money at all. Barely anything in the crepe itself for a $15 and no flavor to make up that.  Not filling and barely a treat, an unfortunate waste of my money

reviews.author: Micheal Jones-Cooper
reviews.text: Crepes were really filling!

reviews.author: Andrew Lloyd-Jones
reviews.text: Half decent crêpes, but at ridiculously inflated prices. $13 - $15 for what is effectively a snack is pretty shocking even by New York standards.

reviews.author: Emeline Chatelot
reviews.text:
Expensive for nothing.
$21 for a coffee and a ham and cheese crepe, I won’t comeback!

reviews.author: Jemil Lacaba
reviews.text: Delicious sweet and savory crepes that are ready in minutes! Thanks to Erick and the friendly staff for making every visit special.

reviews.author: Hero Angeles
reviews.text: I love studying here! Erick creates a cozy atmosphere, and the crepes are the best fuel for my brain. ❤️

reviews.author: Nachee Vonxey Salvador
reviews.text: You gotta love the quick service here! Erick and the staff are fantastic, plus the crepes are a delicious treat for any time of day." 😍

reviews.author: Elaine Grace Perez
reviews.text: The crepes here are fantastic! Erick and his staff always serve them quickly, perfect for a quick stop. Highly recommend!

reviews.author: Assher Valiente
reviews.text: Perfect spot for a quick bite! Erick and his team serve up delicious crepes in no time. Love the vibe here!

reviews.author: Gloria Wang
reviews.text: Found my new favorite cozy spot! It’s the perfect place to warm up. Huge shoutout to Sam for being so friendly and recommending the Sugar Lemon, it was delicious. 10/10 would recommend!"

reviews.author: chiu ping Ma
reviews.text: Very nice and bright space that serves delicious food! Once you walk in, it smells delicious! Sam was helpful, giving me suggestions and options after I told her it was my first time. The team is very hard working and fast. I recommend the provence with ham and a hazelnut latte. I'll be back soon!

reviews.author: Alexis Moh
reviews.text: Whenever I need a break from studying, I know I can rely on Erick and his staff for delicious crepes and a warm atmosphere. ❤️

reviews.author: Mark Dianho Paguyo
reviews.text: Fast service and great crepes! Erick knows how to make everyone feel at home, and the staff is always cheerful.

reviews.author: Marianne Quiambao
reviews.text:
I had an incredible time at this restaurant. The service was outstanding—everyone was attentive, friendly, and made sure we were taken care of the entire time. The food was absolutely delicious and beautifully prepared. Every dish had great flavor and came out perfectly.

Highly recommended! Great service by Erick, kudos.  I’ll definitely be coming back.

reviews.author: Ghuia Uy
reviews.text: Sweet or savory, you can’t go wrong with the crepes! Erick’s hospitality makes this place feel like home every time I visit.

reviews.author: Cee Espelita
reviews.text: Best place to work and study! Erick makes sure you’re comfortable, and the free WiFi is a bonus. The crepes? Absolutely delicious!

reviews.author: Lily Garcia
reviews.text: Whenever I need a quick bite, I head to Erick’s place! The hospitality is amazing, and the crepes are mouthwatering. Definitely coming back

reviews.author: Kathleen Olivia
reviews.text: "Erick and his incredible team always make me feel at home. The sweet and savory crepes are a must-try, especially when you need something fast!"

reviews.author: Leila Alejo
reviews.text: Feeling rushed? Erick and his staff will have you fed in minutes! The crepes are fantastic; I always look forward to my visit.

reviews.author: Chelsie Santonia
reviews.text: Erick runs an amazing place! Quick crepe service, fantastic flavors, and a great atmosphere for working. Love it here!

reviews.author: Mack Dacayo
reviews.text: If you're craving crepes, don't look further! The service is speedy, and the flavours --sweet or savory -- are fantastic! Erick is always helpful! 👌😍

reviews.author: apple anne marcelo
reviews.text: Delicious crepes made fresh and fast! The staff is lovely and friendly, and Erick ensures everything's going perfectly. A great spot when you're in a rush!

reviews.author: Alexander July Abad
reviews.text: Fast and friendly service paired with incredible crepes—Sweet options are delightful, and Erick keeps you feeling at home!

reviews.author: jerome marcelo
reviews.text: Great place for fantastic crepes! The service is efficient, and Erick makes everyone feel at home. Perfect if you’re in a rush!

reviews.author: Ja Co
reviews.text: Sweet crepes = heaven! 🍓✨ Fast, respectful staff & Erick runs the line like a pro. Cozy vibes—highly recommend!

reviews.author: Trisha Onia
reviews.text: I love grabbing a savory crepe here when I’m in a rush! Fantastic flavors and quick service with a warm touch from Erick and the team.

reviews.author: L.a. Navarro
reviews.text: If you're in a hurry, this is the best place to be! The savory crepes are packed with flavor and the service is quick. The manager, Erick, is very friendly! Kudos!

reviews.author: Joanne Colcol
reviews.text: Outstanding crepes! Sweet or savory, they’re both amazing! The friendly service from Erick and his team makes for a pleasant, quick visit.

reviews.author: Milgrace Navarro
reviews.text: Delicious crepes! Whether sweet or savory, they hit the spot. Fast service and friendly staff make it a perfect pit stop. Erick, the manager, keeps everything running smoothly! ❤❤❤

reviews.author: G Frye
reviews.text: One time we tried their egg Gruyère and ham omelette crepe, and it was delicious. Their crepes always smelled very good.

reviews.author: Joshua Lucksom
reviews.text: Crepes were delicious! Sam was super helpful and recommended some to take home for our friends too.

reviews.author: michelle keith
reviews.text: Yummy 😋

reviews.author: Niya Xiang
reviews.text: A good place to go if you want something sweet！ Eric is great!

reviews.author: Frank Accardi
reviews.text: Vive La Crepe is now my favorite crêpe spot! The atmosphere is cozy, and the food is fantastic the savory Chicken Pesto and the sweet Nutella and Banana crêpes were both perfect. What really made the experience shine was the service, especially from Samantha. She was truly great! Samantha was friendly, offered wonderful menu ideas (I tried her suggested Nutella and Banana and loved it), and managed everything with a bright, welcoming attitude. I highly recommend stopping by; thanks to Samantha and the amazing food, I can't wait for my next visit.

reviews.author: Stephanie Bishundat
reviews.text: This place is excellent. Samantha was super helpful! Thank you again!

reviews.author: Vanessa W
reviews.text: The crepes here are amazing! Sam was so friendly!

reviews.author: Patrick Yeboah
reviews.text: Sam was supper helpful and attended to our needs respectfully.

reviews.author: Kushal Sherpa
reviews.text: Great crepes and better vibes, can't ask for better than that. Sam was super friendly and helpful. Definitely coming back here soon.

reviews.author: Tess McCallum
reviews.text: Love this place! I’m always greeted with a smile by Samantha, she makes this place shine. Yummy yummy!

reviews.author: Marilou Bolado
reviews.text: Vive la Crepe has become an essential for me.It's always busy, but they never keep you waiting for long. Erick including the staff are wonderful, and their service never lacks a smile. Their crepes are delicious. I keep coming back in here for their latte.

reviews.author: France Ann Clare Navarro
reviews.text: I’m a big fan of Vive la Crepe! Even when the place is busy, they manage to serve quickly without losing their warm, friendly touch. Erick and the crepe makers often go the extra mile to make sure every visit is enjoyable. Their crepes are simply delicious.

reviews.author: Patrick Queral
reviews.text: Vive la Crepe is truly a gem! Erick and his team work so well together, even during the busiest times. The service is quick, and the staff is always so friendly and helpful. I love the crepes here, and it’s the perfect spot if you're in a rush but still want great food!

reviews.author: Juander Shop
reviews.text: I can't recommend Vive la Crepe enough 😁 It's busy, but Erick and his team manage to keep the line moving without losing that friendly vibe. The crepes are delicious, get the Amelie, it’s good. They always provide a good service with a smile. I keep returning for both the food and the friendly atmosphere.

reviews.author: Goldwyn Salazar
reviews.text: I love visiting Vive la Crepe. Even when it's busy, the service is impressively quick. Eric and the friendly staff always serve with a smile. The crepes are delicious, and I keep coming back here because they're accommodating, and the place is clean.

reviews.author: Shirley Zhang
reviews.text: This is my first time trying this place out so I didn’t know what to try. I talked to the Sam in the front about what things I liked and she gave me a really yummy suggestion with berries. Will be back!

reviews.author: Genevieve Labuguen
reviews.text: The best coffee and crepe i’ve ever tasted! Plus customer service is excellent. Not to mention that the Asian manager is cute, he is so warm and accommodating, he makes you feel at home. 🤗

reviews.author: Will Holmgren
reviews.text: A neighborhood delight.  Sam, in particular, brightens the place.  Merci beaucoup

reviews.author: Corie Alobba
reviews.text: Vive la Crepe is my go-to spot. It's a bit busy when I go there, but they manage to serve you quickly. The staff, especially the Asian guy, Erick is very friendly and always makes my experience enjoyable. Their crepes are delicious, and I always leave happy! A must try.

reviews.author: Noah Chen
reviews.text: This is my go to spot to have a cup of tea and a sugar lemon crepe. Sam is always so kind and welcoming remembering my order every time I come in. Even when they are busy the workers are very hard working and efficient to get everyone's order ready. Love this place, great place to get some work done with their wifi and people watch.

reviews.author: Redentor Reyes
reviews.text: Vive la crepe is a nice place to grab a bite. Although it’s usually crowded during lunch time, the service remains quick and helpful. Erick and his staff are always welcoming, and their crepes are the best. Anytime I’m in a hurry, this is where I go cause their ham and cheese is my favorite.Visit them soon.

reviews.author: M K
reviews.text:
It was… okay. The atmosphere, service, and décor are adorable clearly created with care and attention to detail. You can tell there’s passion behind the place.

Unfortunately, the crêpes we had felt pretty basic and a bit rationed. Not a lot for the cost, and not very filling. Maybe some of their more adventurous options would’ve been better, but I left wishing I’d ordered something else.

The coffee, though? Genuinely good.

Not much else to say. There are plenty of great food options nearby, and while I’m glad we tried it, I wish we’d gone elsewhere this time.

reviews.author: Amanda Blachorsky
reviews.text: What a delight to have this so close to my office! Everyone who works there is super nice and the crepes are always delicious. My go to is the sugar and lemon but the Provence is also so good!

reviews.author: Joanna Akerman
reviews.text: Delicious - especially after school. Love apple cinnamon pie!

reviews.author: Lexi Hammond
reviews.text: I love all the options here! Crepes are amazing and staff is so friendly. Im here all the time!

reviews.author: Agron Bytyqi
reviews.text: This place is good . Erick treats me right.

reviews.author: lyla chana
reviews.text: so amazing! best place to come and study, with good wifi, along with a yummy crepe.

reviews.author: Dia Abdykerim
reviews.text: Sooo good have to try!

reviews.author: Stan Schneider
reviews.text: Stopped there to relax and have a latte. Coffee was not great, latte was lukewarm.

reviews.author: Emma Conroy
reviews.text: I love this place but why did they get rid of large coffees? This is my Thursday treat breakfast and I need a large coffee to go with it. This morning I just went next door to Matto for my coffee. 😢

reviews.author: Nat Rabinor
reviews.text: great crepes and amazing service

reviews.author: Ashley Allen
reviews.text: Tito’s review seems very entitled and disingenuous. I am a regular here and always feel welcomed by Sam and Keury. They have always been kind and even remember my name and order after just a couple visits. The food always hits the spot (I normally get the savory Amelie crepe) and I love my oat lattes! Come in and try for yourself because the vibe is always good! It can get bust after 3pm when the schools let out, so keep that in mind.

reviews.author: Siri Moses
reviews.text: Sam was great and very nice! Very professional and welcoming. 10/10 service! Definitely recommend if you’re in the neighborhood. Crepe was great.

reviews.author: Tito
reviews.text:
Service was atrocious. Sam, behind the register, could not have been less welcoming. Headphone in, not paying attention, did not say a word and looked annoyed that we were there (what do they pay her for?!)

Anyway, crepe was alright but bad service just makes it less enjoyable experience. Better go next door to Matto or anywhere else in the city.

reviews.author: Jennie Rivera
reviews.text: Absolutely wonderful without qualification. The team provided speedy, skilled, and friendly service. The items I've eaten had good taste. I had no words to express my feelings. I plan to come back and explore more menu items.

reviews.author: Despina Drougas
reviews.text: The most delicious crepes! I didn’t even realize this was a chain restaurant because the quality and taste are so good!! I order the Province crepe 3x a week and highly recommend it! Bringing my friends here too!

reviews.author: Arjun Shah
reviews.text: close to me. love this place, fresh crepes savory and sweet really nice especially in the winter-time

reviews.author: Amir Ince
reviews.text: Excellent service, even more excellent food

reviews.author: dana pizzimenti
reviews.text:
Hello, I was just in the place today ordering food to sit at the table in front of the place. As i sat, i saw a teens eating outside food like pizza  on like 3 tables. One teen had his chair against my table. Invading my space and its annoying cause hes right against my table trapping me. Annoyed,
I told the workers that a bunch of them were eating out side food and they did nothing. Its unfair  for me to eat food from there to sit comfortabally outside and teens are eating pizza and banging chairs against other table.

reviews.author: Pankaj Jetley
reviews.text: Loved the savory crepe

reviews.author: jesus parada hernandez
reviews.text: Buen servicio,tranquilo y comida pasable

reviews.author: clarkson potter
reviews.text: Didn't give me one of my crepes

reviews.author: MA A
reviews.text: Crepe was delicious!

reviews.author: Maryana Rybay
reviews.text: It’s the best crepe that I have been even trying

reviews.author: E J
reviews.text: not tasty unfortunately. no flavor in the crepes or the add ins.

reviews.author: Mike Christel
reviews.text: Small but cozy creperie that does offer outdoor seating as well,  with very tasty savory and sweet crepes whose goodies inside welcome the diner! They look plain from the outside but deliver a welcome meal!

reviews.author: Britt Borders
reviews.text:
I have a gluten allergy, I was visiting New York and got a Nutella crepe with strawberries and the ham and cheese crepe with buckwheat.

It was SOOOOO GOOD. And the service was great, fast and they were super friendly. Trying to get my boyfriend to go back before we leave. Will definitely return!

reviews.author: Anduin Havens
reviews.text: I am so excited to eat buckwheat crepes in the US! My French family is happy too :)

reviews.author: Oisín Ó hAlmhain
reviews.text: Great to find gluten-free buckwheats crepes! Thanks

reviews.author: Amy Vanderwal
reviews.text: Love this place but they need to bring back peanut butter crepes!

reviews.author: David Cunningham
reviews.text: BEC (bacon egg & gruyere) was thoroughly disappointing. Chunks of soft (canadian?) bacon with no saltiness at all in the collective contents.  Great service. I’ll probably come back to try the sweet crepes for date night, but likely won’t get savory here again.

reviews.author: Franck Doucet
reviews.text: Très bonne crêpe !!

reviews.author: Elisabeth M
reviews.text: The perfect small breakfast, I ordered the sugar and butter crepe and it was just what I needed. It’s a cute spot with good service.

reviews.author: Adelina M
reviews.text: I have been coming here for my iced coffee and crepes for years, the staff are super friendly and the food is amazing.  Id like to shout out Samantha for her kindness and for always making me feel special :) thanks to the team for all you do!!

reviews.author: William Thomas

Despite the customer asking kindly and thanking the employee, the employee responded unprofessionally and snickered about the customer as soon as they left. I will not be returning here, despite living in the neighborhood.

reviews.author: Karyme D Cravioto
reviews.text: I love the crepes from this place but the level of kindness and customer service depends on the staff that say. There’s a short woman who works on Thursdays a lot and every time I’ve gone in she’s been insanely rude. I could ask her how it’s going and kindly order and she always gives an attitude. I’ve had to ask her to remake drinks because of mistakes and the way she talked to me and basically threw the drink in my hands was so so rude. I avoid the shop when she’s there and am thinking of not going all together because of it. Would love to continue going here if you can hire kinder staff!

reviews.author: Kaitlyn Marie
reviews.text:
Yum! I love Vive la Crepe. It is dangerously close to where I stay when I'm in NYC. All the options they have are fantastic and delicious. They are also super fast. I'm usually a strawberry Nutella girl, but I've been trying to branch out and everything I've tried has been awesome. I definitely reccomend the baked apples, especially with Nutella.

My only complaints: 1) sometimes when I've gotten strawberries they seem to be a little past their use-by date. Too mushy and tasted off.🍓 2) its expensive! Over $10 for each crepe. Obviously, UWS and NYC ain't cheap but it's definitely got to be more of a splurge than a regular because I can't afford that all the time. 🤣

reviews.author: Olivier
reviews.text: Good but a little overpriced

reviews.text: So convenient and who designed the paper wraps? The crepe delectably and delicately falls apart in your mouth. The ingredients were well thought out. Such a tasty meal!

reviews.text: Tried their breakfast crepe - nothing special, way overpriced for what they offer. Did not see much variety either. I suspect many reviewers with the exciting reviews just never been to a truly quality crepe place.

reviews.author: AsiaLuna Patlis
reviews.text: So overpriced!!!! I spent $12 dollars on a Nutella strawberry crepe with whipped cream and $6 on a “large” dulce de leche macchiato that was more of coffee with milk. The strawberries were not fresh. My friend got a mushroom spinach cheese crepe for $11 with barely any ingredients (2 mushrooms). Will never be returning. Lots of crepe places close by for better and cheaper.

reviews.author: Isela “EPStrong” Avila
reviews.text: Tasty crepes and great iced coffee!

reviews.author: Svetlana Rumina
reviews.text:
A wonderful sweet aroma of freshly made crepes is a first thing you hear upon walking in🥰

Cooks make everything right in front of you, so it's quite mesmerizing to watch them carefully fold different fillings into the crepes. They seem to have a tidy cooking station, so that also a good sign.:)

Crepes taste delicious. We got a Sundae Crêpe😋 and a latte with oat milk (which also was great).

They have a few tables (inside and outside seating available), and were about 70% full on Friday early afternoon.

Bonus: clean bathroom with a cute mirror 🧐

reviews.text: Underwhelmed and overpriced

reviews.author: Juancy Rodríguez
reviews.text: A nice spot for some sweet or savory crêpes. Efficient and clean, COVID-safe service, with outdoor and indoor seating - or grab-and-go with the handy carton crêpe ❤️ holder!

reviews.author: Nathaly Ortega
reviews.text: Deliciosas crepas, buena atención, buen precio

reviews.author: Suz Sims-Fletcher
reviews.text:
Part of the five stars is that this was exactly what we wanted - a warm sweet on a cold day.  With our cheesecake crepes ($10) we each had a hot beverage, and ate outside (socially distanced, you know). Both the crepe and the beverage were delicous.

NOW....it isn't cheap.  with tax and tip we were close to $20 each....so maybe keep this for an indulgence.

The crepes LOOK small ( thin) in their cute little cardboard holders - BUT they are, in fact, the right size (and crepes are thin).

I will go back when I am feeling like I was today:  in NEED of just this thing!

reviews.author: Lauren DeFazio
reviews.text: Excellent! Absolutely delicious and made with the most care. Kind and friendly staff, tasty fresh ingredients...I will definitely be back! Highly recommend!

reviews.author: Wyatt Cornell
reviews.text: Fantastic food and it wasn't too busy. However, it was very expensive. The food was almost worth the price

reviews.author: Josh Zignego
reviews.text: It’s a little pricey, but you kind of know that going in. The classic Nutella crepe with berries was delicious

reviews.author: Rurik Nackerud
reviews.text:
This crepe place is as Taco Bell is to authentic Mexican food. The people can be extremely nice or rude. All in your luck. Perhaps more of a slow subway rather than Taco Bell?

If you want an okay crepe - it might be there. I tried this place a couple times and, while they advertise a gluten free crepe, they cook it on the same griddle as the flour crepe. So I won’t return. Aside from that - their cheese, veggies, and non-sweet ingredients have an off odor. I love watching them cook - our in the open - but this is what tuned me into the potentially spoiled or near to spoiled food issue.

Probably great if you have a fast food stomach and no allergies. I imagine that the individual in a hurry would be frustrated by the long wait - and yet that is the quality of the crepe.

reviews.author: Sarka Hyblova
reviews.text: Great spot for a quick break

reviews.author: Marcos Cavalcanti
reviews.text: Good crepe, but it's not the real french crepe...

reviews.author: Saul Kaiserman
reviews.text: My kids love this place... But so do lots of folks so it can get a little crowded at meal times. Gluten free options.

reviews.author: David Linder
reviews.text: This is a great spot for a midday meal in the neighborhood. Their savory crepes are delicious, and they even made our two-year-old son a special dessert crepe. Great service and great coffee too.

reviews.author: David Law
reviews.text: Slightly overpriced, mediocre ham, can use some smile

reviews.author: Michael Le
reviews.text:
Stopped in wanting a sweet crepe as a dessert in a way.  I had high hopes based on the reviews but was skeptical based on the pictures.  Despite some reservations, I decided to give it a try.  I ordered a sweet crepe with cream cheese and strawberries.

Here's the thing - at over $10 for this combination sweet crepe, I was expecting a bit more than just a crepe with a bit of cream cheese blobs and some sliced strawberries, but sadly, this was exactly what I got.  It was literally just cream cheese squeezed in various lines across the crepe  before it was folded in a french style tri-fold fashion.

I get it, this is French style crepe and that's fine.  But for over $10 I was expecting a whole lot more.  The crepe itself is nothing special and pretty flavorless.  It wasn't buttery.  It wasn't sweet.  It was just ... blah.

If you are coming here thinking you're going to get something similar to a Japanese style crepe with ice cream, etc.  You are sadly mistaken.  Go to T-Swirl as that's probably the closest thing you'll get to a japanese style crepe in NYC.

If you're coming here thinking you'll get a good, sweet, french style crepe with quality toppings and delicious buttery sweet crepe.  You will still be sadly mistaken.

I'm not sure why there are such good reviews.  It's just not a good crepe for over $10.  If it only cost $5 - I might be ok with it.  But for the price, Viva La Crepe is a HUGE disappointment.

reviews.author: Crazy AboutJCrew
reviews.text: Delicious crepes in a very cute setting. Can be crowded at 3-4 om when kids in the area gets out of school. Quite expensive (crepes are around $9) but worth it.

reviews.author: Al Cohen
reviews.text: Bottom line - crepes are fun!  This location of the mini-chain creperie is bright and cheery. There are cafe tables and window bar that's good for watching the steady foot traffic on Columbus Ave. The crepes are tasty - savory or sweet choices, though they seem a bit overpriced for the small amount of fillings. The coffee seems to have a high level of sediment which is either a maintenance issue on the equipment or they're using the incorrect grind size for their equipment. Staff is friendly. Having real plates and coffee cups for eat in would make a difference.

reviews.author: Grace Wingerter
reviews.text: Website says open at 8 am, sign on the door says open at 8 am. I arrived at 8:45 to a locked door and was turned away by the employees inside.  I’ll take my business to somewhere who wants it.

reviews.text:
Always good and employees are cordial.  When in the neighborhood, I always make a crepe stop here.

Never too crowded and always presentable.

reviews.author: Jeff L.
reviews.text: Yum! If you love crepes, you need to try these!  I had the Peanut Butter and Nutella!  They also have non-sweet crepes to choose from.

reviews.author: Noelle Lequatre
reviews.text: Was walking by and needed to eat fast. Found this nearby and stopped in. They have many different types of options, from sweet to savory. My fiance and I ordered different things and we were both pleasantly suprised with how tasty they were. The inside of the shop is small so thinks is definitely an eat and go kind of place. Oh and their coffee is nice too.

reviews.author: Jonathan Hirshowitz
reviews.text: yummy crepes!

reviews.author: Denby Liu
reviews.text:
Quite fond of crepes and this eatery provides a decent iteration of the food. Great for when you're not too hungry and want something quick. Or, if you are hungry have two! They have both sweet and savoury versions and they even have Orangina to give you that let's-pretend-I'm-in-France moment.

Also, just like the name and have to shout it out in my best French accent as we walk by. 8)

reviews.author: V Martell
reviews.text: We tried the chicken pesto crepes and they were very good. It's a small place, but it wasn't crowded when we went.

reviews.author: Jacob Cohen
reviews.text: Amazing crepes but the price is a but high.

reviews.author: Scott Zawalski
reviews.text: Good crepe but slow service and they are pricey.

reviews.author: Peter Banasick
reviews.text: très bien

reviews.author: Bruno Bergia
reviews.text: excellent

reviews.author: Erin Knight
reviews.text: Great neighborhood place to go and grab a crepe. The food is made to order so it can take a little while if there are a few people in front of you. But it's worth the wait for something different. The Egg, Gruyere and Ham crepe is a good weekend breakfast meal.

reviews.author: Marjon Otero
reviews.text: Cute neighborhood crepe place with great customer service.
